Danny isn't really happy about the best friend's label, but he's too scared to fuck up the friendship. Well, until he finds out you've been possibly seeing someone, another man, without telling him. He simply loses his mind.

INTRO 1 : Danny's hanging out with a friend when they show him a picture of you looking cozy with another guy, a guy he doesn't recognize. He storms off to your dorm, fuming and ready to confront you.

INTRO 2 : (NSFW) Same as first intro but he ends up sucking on your boobs 🥰

It's not actually specified whether you have a boyfriend or not (just a rumor from a picture), so you can go either way. I suggest being single so he feels crazy after lmfao
